summary: Iteration 15: Premium landing page enhancements verified - animated counters, rotating hero text, comparison section, testimonials, and enhanced CTA. All features working correctly. Backend health check and auth endpoints operational.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 {'status': 'healthy'}
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with tokens for test@cursorcode.ai
Backend: GET /api/auth/google returns 503 (expected - OAuth not configured locally)
Frontend: NeuralBackground canvas (data-testid='neural-background') present in hero section
Frontend: RotatingText component shows cycling app types ('a SaaS dashboard', etc.)
Frontend: Stats strip AnimatedCounter shows '50,000+' Apps Built
Frontend: Stats strip AnimatedCounter shows '99.9%' Uptime SLA
Frontend: Stats strip AnimatedCounter shows '7' AI Agents
Frontend: Stats strip AnimatedCounter shows '<60s' Avg. Deploy Time
Frontend: Comparison section heading 'Not just a tool — a full AI team' found
Frontend: Traditional Development card (data-testid='comparison-traditional') shows '14-28 weeks' and '$50K - $200K+'
Frontend: CursorCode AI card (data-testid='comparison-cursorcode') shows 'Under 2 minutes' and 'From $0/month'
Frontend: Testimonial-0 (Sarah Chen, Founder at DataPulse) with 5-star rating
Frontend: Testimonial-1 (Marcus Rodriguez, CTO at ScaleForge) with 5-star rating
Frontend: Testimonial-2 (James Park, VP Engineering at NovaTech) with 5-star rating
Frontend: CTA section heading 'The future of software engineering starts now' found
Frontend: CTA 'Start Building Free' button (data-testid='final-cta-btn') present
Frontend: CTA 'View Pricing' button (data-testid='final-pricing-btn') present
Frontend: 2 NeuralBackground components (hero + CTA sections)
Frontend: Login page has Google SVG icon and cybersecurity theme (bg: rgb(10, 14, 26))
Frontend: Signup page has Google SVG icon and cybersecurity theme (bg: rgb(10, 14, 26))
critical_code_review_comments: AnimatedCounter.js uses IntersectionObserver + requestAnimationFrame for smooth count-up animation when scrolled into view
RotatingText.js uses framer-motion AnimatePresence to cycle through app prompts every 3 seconds
Comparison section has proper data-testid attributes for testing (comparison-traditional, comparison-cursorcode)
Testimonials section has data-testid='testimonial-0/1/2' with star ratings, quotes, and reviewer info
Enhanced CTA section includes NeuralBackground particle network as backdrop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified new premium landing page features: AnimatedCounter component (IntersectionObserver triggers count-up from 0 when scrolled into view), RotatingText component (AnimatePresence cycles through 6 app types every 3s), Comparison section showing Traditional Dev (14-28 weeks/$50K-$200K+) vs CursorCode AI (Under 2 minutes/From $0/month), Testimonials section with 3 cards (Sarah Chen/DataPulse, Marcus Rodriguez/ScaleForge, James Park/NovaTech), Enhanced CTA with 'The future of software engineering starts now' heading and dual buttons. All data-testid attributes present. Login/Signup pages retain Google SVG icon with cybersecurity dark theme.
